questions.question: Electives (Q001): A clinical concept related to treatment planning is assessed. Which option is MOST accurate?
questions.option_b: Incorrect mechanism or association for treatment planning
questions.option_c: Finding typical of a different condition than treatment planning
questions.option_d: Correct statement consistent with treatment planning
questions.explanation: The correct answer reflects standard undergraduate medical/dental knowledge for treatment planning.

questions.question: Electives (Q002): A clinical concept related to interdisciplinary care is assessed. Which option is MOST accurate?
questions.option_a: Correct statement consistent with interdisciplinary care
questions.option_c: Finding typical of a different condition than interdisciplinary care
questions.option_d: Incorrect mechanism or association for interdisciplinary care
questions.explanation: The correct answer reflects standard undergraduate medical/dental knowledge for interdisciplinary care.
